text: A healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well and exercising. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for at least thirty minutes a day, keeps your heart strong and your muscles active. However, rest is just as important; most adults need seven to nine hours of quality sleep each night to recharge. Your mental health also matters. Managing stress through mindfulness or hobbies, and maintaining a good work-life balance, can prevent burnout and improve your overall happiness. Small, consistent habits in these four areas can make a big difference.
